instructions.instruction: Before creating any file, check REVIEWED.md and references/REFERENCE_INDEX.md for the slug or repo URL. If already present, report the duplicate and stop.
instructions.relevant_when: User provides a tool to triage.
instructions.why_given: The skill mandates a duplicate check as step 2, and the NEVER anti-pattern prohibits creating a new references file without checking first.

instructions.instruction: Assess scope fit before writing the summary. Classify the tool as 'in scope', 'borderline', or 'out of scope' and document the reasoning.
instructions.relevant_when: Evaluating any tool for inclusion in the research repo.
instructions.why_given: Step 4 requires an explicit scope assessment before investing in a full write-up, with defined categories and handling for each.

instructions.instruction: Always mark self-reported benchmark numbers as '(as reported)' — never state them as verified facts.
instructions.relevant_when: Populating the self-reported metrics section of references/<slug>.md.
instructions.why_given: The NEVER anti-pattern prohibits treating self-reported benchmarks as verified; the skill requires the '(as reported)' qualifier.

instructions.instruction: Create references/<slug>.md using templates/REFERENCE-tool.md. Populate every section; mark inapplicable subsections as N/A rather than leaving them blank.
instructions.relevant_when: Writing the reference summary for any newly triaged tool.
instructions.why_given: The skill specifies this template as the canonical structure and requires every section to be addressed.

instructions.instruction: Do not run 'git submodule add' without explicit user confirmation. Offer vendoring as a follow-up option after the summary is written.
instructions.relevant_when: Any time the tool warrants vendoring into tools/ for code-level inspection.
instructions.why_given: The NEVER anti-pattern explicitly prohibits running git submodule add during triage; step 6 requires vendoring to be offered as a choice.

instructions.instruction: Add a reverse-chronological row to the REVIEWED.md summary table and a detailed section including repo URL, author, version, language, tags, scope-fit, and disposition (pending).
instructions.relevant_when: After completing the reference summary for any tool.
instructions.why_given: Step 7 specifies the exact fields required including scope-fit, which is unique to tool triage.

instructions.instruction: Do not create an ANALYSIS-*.md file during triage. Offer promotion as an option to the user after the triage is complete.
instructions.relevant_when: At the end of any triage workflow.
instructions.why_given: The NEVER anti-pattern explicitly prohibits creating ANALYSIS-*.md as part of triage.

instructions.instruction: Add a row to references/REFERENCE_INDEX.md under the most relevant topic category table.
instructions.relevant_when: After completing the reference summary and REVIEWED.md entry.
instructions.why_given: Step 8 requires updating the REFERENCE_INDEX.md as part of every triage.
